creator: mirya@zoc.com.ua
text:
Updated to 0.2.0 audio/libmtp fails to build:

..
ranlib .libs/libmtp.a
creating libmtp.la
(cd .libs && rm -f libmtp.la && ln -s ../libmtp.la libmtp.la)
Making all in examples
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I..    -I/usr/local/include -I../src -O2 -pipe -ffast-math -Wall -Wmissing-prototypes -MT connect.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/connect.Tpo -c -o connect.o connect.c
connect.c: In function `main':
connect.c:100: error: syntax error before "LIBMTP_VERSION_STRING"
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/audio/libmtp/work/libmtp-0.2.0/examples.
*** Error code 1

No idea what extra host information may be useful (I should say elder libmtp version is already installed), feel free to ask it if it's needed.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/audio/mtp
make
